subcodes.first_line: O dyer of the divine cloud! Dye all contingent beings with this hue that hath appeared in the horizons, that they may be tinged with the coloring of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا صباغ العما صبغ الممکنات من هذا الصبغ الذی ظهر فی الافاق لعل یصبغن بصبغ الله
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @thankfulness; gratitude
